3064720.name: Balloon Warfare
3064720.description:
Upgrade your weapon, get stronger, and beat the boss with your team to get an advantage on the enemy team!

Start with a basic tier 1 weapon and upgrade it all the way to the max tier by either hunting balloons or killing players to get the required balloons for your weapon. Additionally every single weapon is upgradable and each upgrade changes the weapon slightly. There are also many characters to choose from each has their own unique ability.

During the game, Boss Balloons will be spawned. That's when you and the enemy team will compete for the boss. The winning team will gain a Killer Balloon to fight alongside them.

Features:

  • Shooting

  • Many characters with unique abilities

  • Weapon upgrades

  • PvPvE

  • Arena Shooter

  • Boss Fights

  • & More!
